name: User Authentication
description: Email/password authentication with JWT tokens and role-based access control

name: Role-Based Access Control
description: Granular permissions based on user roles (Admin, Agent, Adjuster, Viewer)

name: Policy Search
description: Multi-criteria policy search with exact and partial matching capabilities

name: Policy Details View
description: Comprehensive policy information display with data masking and accessibility

name: Policy Creation
description: Create new policies with validation, encryption, and audit logging

name: Policy Management
description: Update existing policies with audit trail and conflict prevention

name: Claim Creation
description: Create claims linked to policies with automatic claim number generation

name: Claim History View
description: Display claim history with sorting, filtering, and performance optimization

name: Claim-Level Policy Overrides
description: Manage policy information at claim level for unverified policies

name: Claim Status Management
description: Workflow management for claim status with business rule validation

name: Payment Method Setup
description: Onboard payees with KYC verification and multiple payment methods

name: Payment Creation
description: Create payments with multi-payee support and reserve allocation

name: Payment Lifecycle Management
description: Handle voids, reversals, reissues with complete audit trail

name: Tax Reporting and Compliance
description: Tax withholding, 1099 generation, and compliance management

name: EDI Medical Payments
description: EDI 835/837 processing for medical provider payments with CPT/ICD mapping

name: Settlement Management
description: Negotiation tracking, coverage opinions, and settlement plan management

name: External System Integrations
description: Integration with Stripe, banks, Xactimate, EDI, and document management

name: Data Validation Framework
description: Comprehensive input validation and business rule enforcement

name: Data Security Framework
description: Encryption, masking, and secure handling of sensitive data

name: Audit and Compliance Logging
description: Comprehensive audit trail with correlation IDs and structured logging

name: Global Error Handling
description: Consistent error response format and graceful error management

name: Health Check Endpoints
description: Liveness and readiness endpoints for monitoring and deployment

name: Performance Optimization
description: Database indexing, connection pooling, and response time optimization

name: Configuration Management
description: Environment-based configuration with feature flags and security settings
